required_security_actions.reason: Integration pattern is ambiguous. Questionnaire describes a potential service-account extraction agent accessing ERP directly, which would be TIER_1 if confirmed. This must be clarified before security review can proceed.
Data classification is REGULATED (EU personal data and employee records present). Integration involves ERP-connected regulated data. Security review is required regardless of tier confirmation.
Existing NDA status is PENDING. Per ISP-001 §12, NDA must be executed before information exchange.
